title: Build Planner Schema
description: Determines build, test, and deployment strategy based on modified files

BUILD_LAMBDAS.description: True if any Lambda code was modified

BUILD_CONTAINER.description: True if container build is needed (application code, Dockerfile, or dependencies changed)

RUN_TESTS_LOCALLY.description: True if only Python/test files changed and tests can run in local venv

RUN_TESTS_IN_CONTAINER.description: True if container build is needed before running tests

DEPLOY_TO_AWS.description: True if AWS deployment (ECR push + stack update) is required

MIGRATE_DATABASE.description: True if models.py was modified and DB migration may be needed

UPDATE_STACK_TF.description: True if stack.tf or any .tf files were modified

PUSH_TO_ECR.description: True if container should be pushed to ECR (application code or Dockerfile changed)

RUN_BACKEND_TESTS.description: True if backend tests should be executed (backend Python code changed)

RUN_FRONTEND_TESTS.description: True if frontend tests should be executed (frontend JS/CSS/templates changed)

REASONING.description: Brief explanation of the build strategy decision
